mapper.sql:
select id, day_str, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt,
plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi, plate_name_th, plate_name_ru, plate_name_ar, bet_amount, bet_num, bet_people_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, code_amount, calculations_time, create_time, update_time, game_cost, game_cost_merchant from t_game_plate_count_order
mapper.insert:
insert into t_game_plate_count_order
day_str, currency_id, item_id, chain_tag, plate_code, plate_name_zh, plate_name_en, plate_name_ko, plate_name_pt,
plate_name_vi, plate_name_tr, plate_name_tw, plate_name_ja, plate_name_hi, plate_name_th, plate_name_ru, plate_name_ar,
bet_amount, bet_num, bet_people_num, settle_amount, win_lose_amount, efficient_bet_amount, code_amount, calculations_time, create_time, update_time, game_cost, game_cost_merchant,
#{dayStr}, #{currencyId}, #{itemId}, #{chainTag}, #{plateCode}, #{plateNameZh}, #{plateNameEn}, #{plateNameKo}, #{plateNamePt}, {plateNameVi}, {plateNameTr}, {plateNameTw}, {plateNameJa}, {plateNameHi}, {plateNameTh}, {plateNameRu}, {plateNameAr},
#{betAmount}, #{betNum}, #{betPeopleNum}, #{settleAmount}, #{winLoseAmount}, #{efficientBetAmount}, #{codeAmount}, #{calculationsTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{gameCost}, #{gameCostMerchant},
mapper.update:
update t_game_plate_count_order
day_str = #{dayStr}, currency_id = #{currencyId}, item_id = #{itemId}, chain_tag = #{chainTag}, plate_code = #{plateCode}, plate_name_zh = #{plateNameZh}, plate_name_en = #{plateNameEn}, plate_name_ko = #{plateNameKo}, plate_name_pt = #{plateNamePt},
plate_name_vi = #{plateNameVi}, plate_name_tr = #{plateNameTr}, plate_name_tw = #{plateNameTw}, plate_name_ja = #{plateNameJa}, plate_name_hi = #{plateNameHi}, plate_name_th = #{plateNameTh}, plate_name_ru = #{plateNameRu}, plate_name_ar = #{plateNameAr},
bet_amount = #{betAmount}, bet_num = #{betNum}, bet_people_num = #{betPeopleNum}, settle_amount = #{settleAmount}, win_lose_amount = #{winLoseAmount}, efficient_bet_amount = #{efficientBetAmount}, code_amount = #{codeAmount}, calculations_time = #{calculationsTime}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, game_cost = #{gameCost}, game_cost_merchant = #{gameCostMerchant},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_game_plate_count_order where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select left(day_str, 7) as dayStr , MAX(currency_id) as currencyId , MAX(item_id) as itemId , MAX(chain_tag) as chainTag , MAX(plate_code) as plateCode , MAX(plate_name_zh) as plateNameZh , MAX(plate_name_en) as plateNameEn , MAX(plate_name_ko) as plateNameKo , MAX(plate_name_pt) as plateNamePt , MAX(plate_name_vi) as plateNameVi , MAX(plate_name_tr) as plateNameTr , MAX(plate_name_tw) as plateNameTw , MAX(plate_name_ja) as plateNameJa , MAX(plate_name_hi) as plateNameHi , MAX(plate_name_th) as plateNameTh , MAX(plate_name_ru) as plateNameRu , MAX(plate_name_ar) as plateNameAr , ifnull(sum(bet_amount), 0.0000) as betAmount , ifnull(sum(bet_num), 0) as betNum , ifnull(sum(bet_people_num), 0) as betPeopleNum , ifnull(sum(settle_amount), 0.0000) as settleAmount , ifnull(sum(win_lose_amount), 0.0000) as winLoseAmount , ifnull(sum(efficient_bet_amount), 0.0000) as efficientBetAmount , MAX(calculations_time) as calculationsTime , ifnull(sum(code_amount), 0) as codeAmount , MAX(create_time) as createTime , MAX(update_time) as updateTime , ifnull(sum(game_cost), 0) as gameCost , ifnull(sum(game_cost_merchant), 0) as gameCostMerchant from t_game_plate_count_order where currency_id = #{currencyId} and plate_code = #{plateCode} group by left(day_str, 7) having dayStr = #{dayStr}
